primary_objective: maximize estimated Step 1 recall subject to the Step 2 request budget

samples.development: stratified by year, field completeness, seed hit and IPC
samples.holdout: sealed until all keyword and context rules are frozen
samples.e_random: probability sample used for weighted miss-rate and recall estimation
samples.e_ipc_audit: targeted audit used only for missing-term discovery

note: Numeric thresholds must be preregistered before holdout evaluation. The current keyword file is a seed lexicon, not a validated production taxonomy.
